markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handover of Outreach client workflow and processes to Usman.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Article refreshes require a yellow/strikethrough format** for client review, a process Usman should advocate to change to net-new drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [**Use the `change document` pipeline** for refreshes, but always post-process in Claude to ensure competitive completeness.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [**Manually update Airtable with published URLs** from the client's blog, as they use Asana and often miss this step.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**Jenn will review all of Usman's work** next week to ensure quality and provide direct feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

## Topics

### Article Refresh Workflow

  - [**Client Requirement:** Article refreshes must use a yellow/strikethrough format to show all edits for client review.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [**Recommended Change:** Usman should advocate for net-new drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current format is time-consuming for both teams and makes the final article difficult to visualize.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [**Timing:** The client's strategy shift and upcoming renewal create a good opportunity to propose this change.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [**Pipeline Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
      - [Use the `change document` pipeline in Outreach Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
      - [It generates a point-by-point list of additions (highlight yellow), deletions (strikethrough), and rearrangements.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [**Post-Processing in Claude:**](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [**Why:** The pipeline's output is not 100% reliable for competitive completeness.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [**How:** Use the "Outreach, post-processing" project to compare the draft against top-ranking articles and identify gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Fact-Checking:**](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [**Why:** The pipeline can "shoehorn" stats, misinterpreting data to fit a narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [**Action:** Always verify stats and their context in the source article.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

### Client & Publishing Process

  - [**Client Tooling:** The client uses Asana, not Airtable, for their editorial calendar and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**Publishing Flow:**](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
    1.  [**Staging:** Articles sent to Suleiman for staging.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
    2.  [**Publishing:** Client publishes on their own cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
    3.  [**Airtable Update:** Client often fails to add the published URL to our Airtable OS.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**Required Action:** Usman must manually check the client's blog every few days to find and add missing URLs to Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [**Why:** This data is required for the weekly Looker dashboard update.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [**Other Tools & Tasks:**](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [**`image only generator` pipeline:** Creates standalone images, useful for fixing incorrect titles or replacing low-quality visuals.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [**Bottom-of-funnel CTA:** Add to all articles using the dedicated Claude project.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [**Header Formatting:** Change all headers to sentence case, as many older articles use title case.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Usman:**](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Review the Outreach Operational Manual and Timmy's publishing video.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [Study the client's strategy, company context, and product matrix.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Begin article refreshes on Monday and send all drafts to Jenn for review.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [**Jenn:**](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [Set up the automation to send edit updates to Usman.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [**Joe:**](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [Transfer Linear reminders (e.g., for Looker updates) to Usman.](https://fathom.video/share/TyGzsv24z6CuFMrVbuD-23DXd9TPvPeo?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
